mods.name: ScanIndicator
mods.author: AegeanGryphon
mods.description: Displays scan-progress diamonds on battle animon cards showing your wiki knowledge level at a glance — no need to open the wiki mid-battle.
mods.changelog: **v1.0.1** — Fixed diamond positioning on single-enemy battle cards.

mods.name: HoloboardHoloken
mods.author: AegeanGryphon
mods.description: Allows you to throw your holoken while riding the holoboard. Stay mobile!
mods.changelog: **v1.0.1** — Water animon encounters now work correctly while on the holoboard: attack mode triggers mid-flight, bilia mode triggers the slow-time QTE mid-flight with full rendering above the water surface.

mods.name: DualTypeHoloken
mods.author: AegeanGryphon
mods.description: Lets an animon's hidden secondary type activate matching elemental overworld objects, not just the primary type.

mods.name: EvoScan
mods.author: AegeanGryphon
mods.description: Automatically grants full research level 3 to an animon's evolved form when it evolves, so you never lose wiki data after evolution.

mods.name: WeatherWheel
mods.author: AegeanGryphon
mods.description:
Adds a radial weather selection wheel to the overworld. Press **C** (or right stick click on controller) to open, pick a weather, and it pins to the current map. Selecting Clear removes the pin and lets the game's natural weather resume.

Story weather is detected and respected — the wheel will not override quest-set weather.

mods.name: QuickCraft
mods.author: AegeanGryphon
mods.description: Reduces time requirement for the click-to-hold button to 0.1 seconds.

mods.name: LostSafeguard
mods.author: AegeanGryphon
mods.description: Prevents Lost animon from being knocked out by pre-battle holoken splash damage. Lost animon always enter the battle with at least 1 HP — you still get to fight them.

mods.name: BinderSpawn
mods.author: AegeanGryphon
mods.description: Filters overworld spawns based on animon cards placed in your Manual card binder. Only matching animon spawn in each area — if none of the cards in your binder match the area's spawns, those filters are suppressed. If the binder is empty, normal spawning is restored.
mods.changelog: **v1.0.1** — Fixed spawning for animon with multiple forms (e.g. Minube): placing any form card now covers all regional/variant encounter entries in the area.

mods.name: QuestRewardFix
mods.author: AegeanGryphon
mods.description: A fix for the bug introduced in the 2nd hotfix patch released that triggers quest completion for the Secret Room quest multiple times upon save load.
